pages.text: $(item)Slide Channels$() snap together like rails — straights, corners, and slopes sort themselves out as you place them. No supports needed; slides float wherever you build them.$(br2)Lay a run downhill and hop in: $(thing)gravity alone$() gets you sliding.
Cheap on purpose. One craft paves 16 blocks of slide — build BIG.

While riding:$(br)$(li)$(thing)Crouch$() to brake$(li)$(thing)Jump$() to bail out (not inside a tube!)$(li)Downhill speeds you up, uphill slows you down — unless a Jet pays for the climb.$(br2)You take $(bold)no fall damage$() while riding a slide.
Recolor channels like concrete: surround a dye with eight of them. Sixteen colors, one water park.
pages.title: Colors
